blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Articles and news about tournaments and the product.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about the platform and pricing.
faq.q1: How do I create a tournament?
faq.a1: Sign up and create an organization (club). After superuser approval, you can create tournaments under «My organizations» and choose a format: Americano, Mexicano, Round Robin, or playoffs.
faq.a2: The free plan is unlimited in time, with up to 3 tournaments per month. The Pro plan is a Stripe subscription: unlimited tournaments, white-label, and priority support.
faq.q3: How do I show the grid on the venue screen?
faq.a3: In the tournament card there is a «TV mode» link. Open it in a browser on the big screen — participants will see the current round and score table in real time.
faq.q4: Can I add a second organization admin?
faq.a4: Yes. The organization Owner can add admins in the organization's «Members» section. Only the owner can add new admins.
faq.q5: How do I pay for the Pro plan?
faq.a5: On the Pricing page click «Subscribe to Pro» on the Pro card, select your organization, and complete payment via Stripe (card). The subscription is activated automatically after successful payment.

home.title: Padel tournaments — simple and transparent
home.description: Create and run Americano, Mexicano, Round Robin, and playoff events. Player registration, round grids, leaderboards, and display on screen.
home.featuresTitle: Everything for your tournament in one place
home.feature1Text: Americano, Mexicano, Round Robin, single and double elimination.
home.feature2Text: Scores and rounds update for everyone and on the big screen in real time.
home.feature3Text: Dedicated TV mode: current round and score table, no clutter.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Questions about the product, partnerships, or support — drop us a line.
contact.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: From creating a tournament to showing results on screen — step by step.
howItWorks.step1Text: Sign up and create an organization (club or venue). After superuser approval, you can create tournaments.
howItWorks.step2Text: Pick a format: Americano, Mexicano, Round Robin, or playoffs. Set name and options (points per round, etc.).
howItWorks.step3Text: Add players manually or share a registration link — players sign up themselves.
howItWorks.step4Text: Generate the next round (pairs by format rules), enter scores. Table and display update for everyone automatically.
howItWorks.step5Text: Open the TV link on the big screen — guests see the current round and leaderboard.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Free to start; more features with a subscription.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.review1Quote: No more manual pairings and score sheets. Everything updates by itself, and the hall screen shows the current grid.
reviews.review2Quote: Americano and Mexicano out of the box, plus registration by link. We save time at every event.
reviews.review3Quote: TV mode was the missing piece. Players see who they play and the score at a glance.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We're open to partnering with clubs, federations, and sponsors.
collaboration.clubsText: Integration under your brand, domain, and logo. Joint campaigns and case studies.
collaboration.federationsText: Unified tournament standards, reporting, and event calendar.
collaboration.sponsorsText: Placement on public tournament pages and in the app. Reach the padel audience.
